name: Round Faux Rattan Kids' Lamp with Pleated Floral Shade - Pillowfort™
description: Beautifully decorate and light up your kid's space with the Round Faux-Rattan Lamp with Pleated Floral Shade from Pillowfort™. This round table lamp features a faux-rattan round base that complements the pleated floral shade for a delightful look they'll love. Designed with a one-way light setting, this table lamp is easy to turn on and off with the socket push-through switch.
